trades.reasoning: Perfect score (100) with all five bullish signals firing — RSI in momentum zone, MACD crossover, rising histogram, price well above SMA-20, and volume surge — in a semiconductor equipment sector that's leading today's risk-on rally.

decisions.briefing: Strong risk-on day with NASDAQ up 2.5% and the S&P 500 up 1.8%, led by semiconductor and tech momentum. The screener is dominated by semi-equipment names (ICHR, ACMR, ONTO, FORM, ENTG) all scoring 100 with full signal alignment. With $1,172 cash and 4 open slots, I'm deploying into ICHR — the cleanest setup with a volume surge confirming conviction. Existing positions in QQQ, EAT, OLED, AMZN, WT, and GLXY all remain healthy with no stop-loss or profit-target triggers, so I'm holding them intact.

market_education.summary_en: Markets surged today in a broad risk-on rally, with the NASDAQ gaining 2.5% and the S&P 500 climbing 1.8%, driven largely by strength in semiconductor and technology stocks as chip-equipment makers posted strong price action on heavy volume. Investor sentiment shifted toward growth and cyclical names, with small- and mid-cap semiconductor plays leading the charge — a pattern often seen when institutional money rotates into higher-beta sectors after a period of consolidation. The rally reflected renewed confidence in AI infrastructure spending and continued demand for advanced chip manufacturing equipment.
market_education.summary_zh: 今日市場大幅走強，風險偏好明顯回升，那斯達克指數上漲2.5%，標普500指數上升1.8%，主要受半導體及科技類股帶動。晶片設備製造商在成交量放大的配合下率先發力，顯示機構資金正積極輪動至高貝塔成長型板塊。市場整體情緒反映投資者對人工智能基礎建設支出持續樂觀，以及先進晶片製造設備需求強勁的信心。

daily_lesson.explanation_en: A volume surge occurs when a stock trades at significantly higher volume than its recent average — often 1.5x or more. When price is already rising AND volume spikes, it signals that institutional buyers (funds, market makers) are actively accumulating, not just retail traders. This confirmation makes a breakout more reliable and is one of the strongest signals a momentum screener can produce.
daily_lesson.explanation_zh: 成交量急增是指某隻股票的成交量遠高於近期均值，通常達1.5倍以上。當股價上升的同時伴隨成交量放大，意味著機構投資者（基金、做市商）正在積極建倉，而非僅靠散戶推動。這種「量價配合」的確認信號大幅提升突破的可信度，是動能選股系統中最具分量的信號之一。
